title: onosma heterophylla
intro: Onosma heterophylla, also known as Heterophylla Onosma or simply Onosma, is a flowering plant species within the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems are used in herbal preparations to provide relief from various health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immunity. In traditional herbal medicine, Onosma heterophylla is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
